fail_closed_contract.statement: The helper reads only the exact locked 2019 and 2025 annual enabled-vs-absent action-diff rows plus curated candles, aborts on any row-lock or truth-polarity drift, evaluates only the pre-registered fixed thresholds, excludes context rows from PASS/FAIL adjudication, and keeps every outcome descriptive only with zero runtime, policy, promotion, or readiness authority.

search_boundary.statement: No threshold search, conjunction search, optimizer, grid search, cross-window tuning, backfilled features, reconstructed fields, or substitute fields are allowed. This slice tests fixed-family survival only.
